title: Event Recipients Tracking

title: Create GetReceivedEventsUseCase to fetch private events received by current user
description: Creates use case that queries EventRecipientRepository to get all events received by current user. Joins with Event data to include event details (severity, category, description, creator info). Filters out expired events by default. Returns list of events with recipient metadata.
close_reason: GetReceivedEventsUseCase created with ReceivedEvent data model and filtering methods

title: Create MarkEventOpenedUseCase to mark event as opened
description: Creates use case that calls EventRecipientRepository.markAsOpened when user opens a private event. Updates opened_at timestamp in database. Takes eventId and current userId as parameters.
close_reason: Implemented MarkEventOpenedUseCase and SubscribeToPrivateEventsUseCase with proper Result patterns and integration with existing repositories

title: Create SubscribeToPrivateEventsUseCase for realtime incoming private events
description: Creates use case that subscribes to Supabase Realtime user channel (user:{userId}) for incoming private events. Listens for INSERT events on event_recipients table. Handles new private event notifications and updates UI state. Manages connection lifecycle (subscribe/unsubscribe).
close_reason: Implemented MarkEventOpenedUseCase and SubscribeToPrivateEventsUseCase with proper Result patterns and integration with existing repositories

title: Create PrivateEventsViewModel for received events state management

close_reason: PrivateEventsViewModel created with StateFlow-based state management, integrated with GetReceivedEventsUseCase, MarkEventOpenedUseCase, and SubscribeToPrivateEventsUseCase. DI configuration updated with eventsModule.

close_reason: Created EventsListScreen with received events list display, event cards with category icons, severity indicators, creator names, and event details bottom sheet

description: Creates Compose bottom sheet UI displaying full event details when user taps event marker or list item. Shows severity, category, description, location, creator info (for private), delivery status (for private), and time. Includes clear from list button (local cache only).
close_reason: Created EventDetailsBottomSheet as part of EventsListScreen with full event details, metadata, and action buttons

close_reason: CreatePrivateEventWithRecipientsUseCase created to integrate event recipients with event creation flow. Query UserContacts to get matched users, create EventRecipient records with PENDING status for each matched user.

title: Implement event marker clustering
description: Add marker clustering algorithm for dense areas on map using MapLibre clustering features, with cluster color based on maximum severity within cluster
close_reason: Implemented event marker clustering using MapLibre clustering features. Added cluster circle layers (small/medium/large), cluster count labels, and filters to show individual markers only when not clustered. Note: Severity-based cluster colors require clusterProperties aggregation which is not exposed in MapLibre Compose; using size-based colors as working fallback for hackathon MVP.

title: Database Migration & RLS Policies

close_reason: Created migration file backend/migrations/20250221000009_rls_event_recipients_table.sql with RLS enabled and policies for recipient access and service role full access

description: Create migration file for user_contacts table with all columns (id, user_id, contact_phone_number, display_name, has_app, contact_user_id, created_at, updated_at), unique constraint (user_id, contact_phone_number), and indexes per dbSchema.md
close_reason: Created migration file backend/migrations/20250221000002_create_user_contacts_table.sql with all columns, unique constraint, foreign keys, and indexes per dbSchema.md

title: Create SQL migration for events table

title: Create SQL migration for event_recipients table

close_reason: Created migration file backend/migrations/20250221000004_create_event_recipients_table.sql with composite primary key, foreign keys, delivery status check constraint, and indexes per dbSchema.md

title: Create SQL migration for event_user_state table
